title: asprella ovata
intro: Asprella ovata, also known as the 'Heartleaf or Tengamora', is a species of flowering plant in the family Annonaceae, native to Southeast Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its leaves, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including fever, cough, and respiratory problems. The health benefits of Asprella ovata include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of colds, flu, and other infections. Asprella ovata can be prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or infusion, making it a popular natural remedy in traditional medicine.
